institution.name: Indiana University Health Riley Hospital for Children
aliases: IU SOM Guest Students — Pediatric placements

searchTermsTried: IU Health Riley Children's visiting medical student pediatric elective
searchProcess.robotsOrAccessNotes: Riley Children's visiting-student access is via the parent IU SOM Guest Students program (already documented in IN/iu-health-university-hospital.json).

candidateFindings.pageTitle: Guest Medical Students - Indiana University School of Medicine
candidateFindings.shortQuote: Medical students enrolled at qualifying schools in the United States and Puerto Rico are eligible to apply for guest student elective study at Indiana University School of Medicine.

negativeEvidence.strongNegativeEvidence: Riley Children's does NOT run an independent visiting-MS lane. All access via IU SOM Guest Students program — international students explicitly excluded.
negativeEvidence.weakNegativeEvidence: Riley-specific pediatric elective inventory was not separately captured; relies on IU SOM catalog.

nextAction: Same as IU Health University Hospital: US + PR LCME/COCA only via VSLO, international explicitly excluded, Pathway program $2k stipend.
plainEnglishSummary: Riley Children's visiting-medical-student access is via IU School of Medicine's Guest Students program — same lane as IU Health University Hospital. US and Puerto Rico medical schools only via VSLO. International students explicitly excluded. Riley is the IU SOM pediatric teaching site.
driftCheck: This advanced national USCE discovery because IN gained its second P101 packet (sibling expansion); pediatric AMC documented.
